# Elizim

> Handcrafted home textile products from Karabuk, Turkey. Embroidery, lace, gift wraps and more.

Elizim is a handmade home textile brand based in Karabuk, Turkey. We specialize in custom-designed embroidery, lace, gift wraps (bohca), and other traditional Turkish textile crafts.

## Pages

- [Home](https://elizim.art/tr): Ana sayfa
- [Products](https://elizim.art/tr/urunler): Browse all handcrafted products
- [Patterns](https://elizim.art/tr/desenler): Explore embroidery and design patterns
- [Custom Design](https://elizim.art/tr/ozel-tasarim): Order custom-made textile products
- [About Us](https://elizim.art/tr/hakkimizda): Our story and values
- [Contact](https://elizim.art/tr/iletisim): Get in touch with us
- [Blog](https://elizim.art/tr/blog): Articles about textile crafts and news
- [FAQ](https://elizim.art/tr/sss): Frequently asked questions
- [Pricing Policy](https://elizim.art/tr/fiyat-politikasi): Our pricing information

## Languages

The site is available in three languages:
- Turkish (tr) - default: https://elizim.art/tr
- English (en): https://elizim.art/en
- Arabic (ar): https://elizim.art/ar

## Contact

- Phone: +90 544 861 14 79
- Instagram: @eliziiim, @karabuknakis, @desen.im
- Location: Karabuk, Turkey
